title: I am her. She is me. We are the same woman.
subtitle: A release-and-allow method for collapsing the distance between who you are and the woman you picture with money.
excerpt: A short energy statement practice from Day 22 of the MONEY program. Use to close the gap between your current self and the version of you who already has it.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 22 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

content.text: A three-minute energy statement practice from Day 22 of the MONEY program. The statement works with a specific pattern: picturing the wealthier version of yourself as a different, distant person. This practice works with them as already one.
I am ready to release all separation between who I am now and the woman I picture with money. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow the knowing that I am her, she is me, and we are the same woman. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from Day 22 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow framework draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
